productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Green T-shirt
description: Composition Green round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and branding with crystal embellishments on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery With a clean cut and a neat finish, this feminine top from ucb will look great worn with everything - jeans, shorts, skirts and sandals or sports footwear available in a wide collection at myntra. Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
